untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'climactic structure', 'exhaustion', 'failure tests', and 'structure alignment' — these are subjective chart pattern concepts not expressible via standard technical indicators. The timeframe hierarchy (weekly+ vs daily/hourly) and multi-timeframe confirmation logic cannot be fully encoded in single-timeframe indicator conditions.
translation_notes: Approximated countertrend reversion entry using extreme RSI (>70 long, <30 short) as proxy for climactic exhaustion, with price failing to break previous extremes (prev_high/prev_low) as proxy for failure test. Exit on breach of the re-tested extreme. Parameters [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] remain undefined in source signal and require manual calibration. Higher timeframe bullish/bearish continuation inferred from price position relative to longer-period MA (sma_100 as proxy for weekly structure). This is a heavily compromised approximation of the original intent.
